creative_brief: Close-up hero shot of richly marbled, deep-red grass-fed beef on butcher paper, slightly unwrapped, with visible moisture and texture. Warm, natural lighting. No packaging. Small text overlay: 'Straight from farm to hub.'
primary_text:
Last Tuesday a farmer in Kempsey pulled beef from the cool room. By Thursday it was at the Brookvale hub.

No middlemen. No weeks in cold storage.

100% grass-fed beef, raised on open pasture. No hormones, no feedlots. The farm name is on every cut.

Deeper red. Golden fat. Clean smell when it hits the pan.

No commitment. Collect from Brookvale, Monday to Friday.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Paddock on Tuesday, yours by Thursday
description: 100% grass-fed beef from named NSW farms. Collect fresh from the Brookvale hub.
